description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The structure features a flat roof and a light-colored exterior, with multiple large windows distributed across the facades. There are two visible vehicles parked in a driveway adjacent to the house, and a fenced backyard area with additional greenery and outdoor furniture. The front entrance is accessible from the street, and the property is bordered by a low fence. The overall design is modern and functional, with an emphasis on open outdoor space and natural light.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light exterior, large windows, and a landscaped yard with trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an elevated front-left angle, highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and several large trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct street-facing view, emphasizing the front facade, two parked cars, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_2: View 2 captures the rear and side of the bungalow, revealing the backyard, outdoor seating, and additional windows.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the back and opposite side, focusing on the fenced yard, rear entrance, and more trees along the property boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
